patterns.meta_struct: Meta struct in lib.rs uses serde with optional fields, skip_serializing_if for None/empty
patterns.write_meta: write_meta already uses tmp+rename atomicity (tempfile::Builder + persist) per spec 022
patterns.read_meta: read_meta deserializes from bytes, validates, and hydrates typed metadata
patterns.error_handling: Best-effort operations use 'let _ =' pattern (lines 369, 372 in dispatcher)
patterns.logging: Uses eprintln! macro for warnings/info - no structured logging crate
patterns.tests: Unit tests inline in #[cfg(test)] mod tests at end of lib.rs files
patterns.docs: Markdown documentation in docs/ with clear sections, design principles, contracts

existing_implementations.description: Found tmp+rename atomicity already implemented in write_meta (spec 022). Meta struct has ~40 fields with serde derive. Dispatcher has 5 fs::rename calls for state transitions.

to_add: blake3 (preferred) OR sha2+hex (fallback if blake3 not suitable)

spec_requirements.jsonl_wal: Append logs/events.jsonl on meta_written and stage_transition events. Best-effort only (let _ = append_event)
spec_requirements.checksum: Add checksum field to Meta, compute sha256/blake3 of compact JSON with checksum=None
spec_requirements.validation: read_meta validates checksum, returns Err on mismatch. NO automated replay - caller handles recovery
spec_requirements.storage_doc: Document why filesystem+JSONL over SQLite/Dolt in docs/storage-decision.md
